findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name TarUnArchiver entry name to File construction - Zip Slip
 * @description TarArchiveEntry name flows to File construction in TarUnArchiver without path traversal check
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/tar-zip-slip
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module TarZipSlipConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getName") and
      source.asExpr() = mc and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.archiver.tar", "TarUnArchiver")
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr ce |
      ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = ce.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("extractFile") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module TarZipSlipFlow = TaintTracking::Global<TarZipSlipConfig>;
import TarZipSlipFlow::PathGraph

from TarZipSlipFlow::PathNode source, TarZipSlipFlow::PathNode sink
where TarZipSlipFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "TarUnArchiver entry name flows to file operation from $@.", source.getNode(), "tar entry name"

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractUnArchiver extraction - file path construction patterns
 * @description Find all File constructions in unarchiver code to identify path traversal risks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/unarchiver-file-construction
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from ClassInstanceExpr ce, Method m
where
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  m = ce.getEnclosingCallable() and
  m.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.codehaus.plexus.archiver%")
select ce, "File construction in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + " at line " + ce.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Find all File constructions in unarchiver/archiver code to map potential path traversal entry points

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractUnArchiver extractFile - File construction with tainted entry name
 * @description Find where in extractFile the File is constructed and whether canonical check covers it
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/extractfile-file-construction
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find the extractFile method in AbstractUnArchiver and all File constructions in it
from ClassInstanceExpr ce, Method extractFile
where
  extractFile.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.archiver", "AbstractUnArchiver") and
  extractFile.getName() = "extractFile" and
  ce.getEnclosingCallable() = extractFile and
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File")
select ce, "File construction in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile at line " + ce.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - args: " + ce.getNumArgument() + " argument(s)"
findings.hypothesis: Map all File constructions inside AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile to understand the canonical check scope

message.text: File construction in AbstractUnArchiver.extractFile at line 371 - args: 1 argument(s)
